title: senecio garlandii
intro: Senecio garlandii, also known as Garland's ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio garlandii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Senecio garlandii can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although caution should be taken when using the plant due to its potential toxicity.
